title: Chicken Pollo Brasa
description: A Peruvian-inspired take on traditional Chinese cuisine, this recipe combines the flavors of grilled chicken with a tangy and crunchy slaw.

ingredients.name: Peruvian chicken
ingredients.notes: marinated in sour and a la brasa seasoning

ingredients.name: sour slaw
ingredients.notes: made with shredded cabbage and a sour dressing

instructions: Wrap the Peruvian chicken in flaky pastry and bake for 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, prepare the sour slaw by mixing shredded cabbage with a sour dressing.
Grill the chicken for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Serve the chicken with the sour slaw and a side of steamed vegetables.
Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces and serve in a bowl with the slaw on top.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice.
Note: You can also serve this dish as a snack or appetizer.
